name: Breast Nuzzle
descrip: Nuzzle into soft breasts. Can lower defences. Recoils. Indulgent skill.
outcome: [AttackerName] nuzzles [AttackerHisOrHer] face between [TargetName]'s soft chest, making [TargetHimOrHer] sigh with lust at the display.
